en: The LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：

en: "Speak to the people of Israel and say to them, If anyone makes a special vow to the LORD involving the valuation of persons,
zh: “你要告訴以色列人，對他們說：如果人許特別的願，獻身給耶和華，就要依照你的估價獻身價。

en: then the valuation of a male from twenty years old up to sixty years old shall be fifty shekels of silver, according to the shekel of the sanctuary.
zh: 你應該這樣估價：從二十歲到六十歲的男人，你要按著聖所衡量銀子的標準，估價五百五十克銀子。

en: If the person is a female, the valuation shall be thirty shekels.
zh: 如果是女人，你要估價三百四十二克銀子。

en: If the person is from five years old up to twenty years old, the valuation shall be for a male twenty shekels, and for a female ten shekels.
zh: 如果是五歲到二十歲，男子的估價是二百二十八克銀子，女子是一百一十四克銀子。

en: If the person is from a month old up to five years old, the valuation shall be for a male five shekels of silver, and for a female the valuation shall be three shekels of silver.
zh: 如果是一個月到五歲，男子的估價是五十七克銀子，女子是三十四克銀子。

en: And if the person is sixty years old or over, then the valuation for a male shall be fifteen shekels, and for a female ten shekels.
zh: 如果是六十歲以上，男子的估價是一百七十一克銀子，女子是一百一十四克銀子。

en: And if someone is too poor to pay the valuation, then he shall be made to stand before the priest, and the priest shall value him; the priest shall value him according to what the vower can afford.
zh: 那人若是貧窮，不能支付你估定的價，就要把他帶到祭司面前，讓祭司估定他的價；祭司就按著許願的人的經濟能力，估定他的價。

en: "If the vow is an animal that may be offered as an offering to the LORD, all of it that he gives to the LORD is holy.
zh: 如果所許的是可以獻給耶和華為供物的牲畜，獻給耶和華的任何牲畜，都要分別為聖。

en: He shall not exchange it or make a substitute for it, good for bad, or bad for good; and if he does in fact substitute one animal for another, then both it and the substitute shall be holy.
zh: 不可更換，也不可代替；無論是好的換壞的，或是壞的換好的，都不可以。如果人一定要以另一隻牲畜代替以前所許的牲畜獻上，那麼以前所許的和用來交換的，都要分別為聖。

en: And if it is any unclean animal that may not be offered as an offering to the LORD, then he shall stand the animal before the priest,
zh: 所許的若是不潔淨的牲畜，人不能把牠獻給耶和華為供物，就要把牲畜牽到祭司面前；

en: and the priest shall value it as either good or bad; as the priest values it, so it shall be.
zh: 祭司要按牲畜的好壞估價；祭司估價多少，就是多少。

en: But if he wishes to redeem it, he shall add a fifth to the valuation.
zh: 如果他一定要把牲畜贖回，就要按你的估價，多付五分之一。

en: "When a man dedicates his house as a holy gift to the LORD, the priest shall value it as either good or bad; as the priest values it, so it shall stand.
zh: “如果有人把房屋分別為聖獻給耶和華，祭司要按房屋的好壞估價，祭司估價多少，就定它價值多少。

en: And if the donor wishes to redeem his house, he shall add a fifth to the valuation price, and it shall be his.
zh: 把自己房屋分別為聖的人，如果要贖回房屋，就要按你估定的價銀，多加五分之一，房屋才可以歸他。

en: "If a man dedicates to the LORD part of the land that is his possession, then the valuation shall be in proportion to its seed. A homer of barley seed shall be valued at fifty shekels of silver.
zh: “如果有人把自己產業的一部分，分別為聖獻給耶和華，你的估價要根據那地的撒種量：每撒大麥二十公斤，估價五百七十克銀子。

en: If he dedicates his field from the year of jubilee, the valuation shall stand,
zh: 如果他從禧年起，把自己的田地分別為聖，就要按照你的估價定那田地的價值。

en: but if he dedicates his field after the jubilee, then the priest shall calculate the price according to the years that remain until the year of jubilee, and a deduction shall be made from the valuation.
zh: 如果他在禧年以後，把自己的田地分別為聖，祭司就要照著到下一個禧年所剩餘的年數，給他計算價銀，然後從你的估價減去這價銀。

en: And if he who dedicates the field wishes to redeem it, then he shall add a fifth to its valuation price, and it shall remain his.
zh: 把自己田地分別為聖的人，如果一定要贖回田地，就要按你的估價，多付五分之一，田地才可以歸他。

en: But if he does not wish to redeem the field, or if he has sold the field to another man, it shall not be redeemed anymore.
zh: 如果他不贖回田地，而賣給別人，他就再也不能贖回田地了。

en: But the field, when it is released in the jubilee, shall be a holy gift to the LORD, like a field that has been devoted. The priest shall be in possession of it.
zh: 到了禧年，買主就要交出那地歸耶和華為聖，像永屬耶和華的聖地一樣，歸祭司為產業。

en: If he dedicates to the LORD a field that he has bought, which is not a part of his possession,
zh: 如果人把買來的田地，不是自己承受為業的田地，分別為聖獻給耶和華，

en: then the priest shall calculate the amount of the valuation for it up to the year of jubilee, and the man shall give the valuation on that day as a holy gift to the LORD.
zh: 祭司就要按照你的估價，給他計算，直到禧年為止；價值多少，他必須當天付給你估定的價銀，表示把那地獻給耶和華為聖。

en: In the year of jubilee the field shall return to him from whom it was bought, to whom the land belongs as a possession.
zh: 到了禧年，那地要歸還賣主，就是歸還那承受那地為業的原主。

en: Every valuation shall be according to the shekel of the sanctuary: twenty gerahs shall make a shekel.
zh: 你的一切估價，都要照著聖所衡量銀子的標準。

en: "But a firstborn of animals, which as a firstborn belongs to the LORD, no man may dedicate; whether ox or sheep, it is the LORD's.
zh: “唯獨牲畜的頭一胎，無論是牛或是羊，既然頭一胎是屬於耶和華的，人就不能再把牠分別為聖，因為這本是耶和華的。

en: And if it is an unclean animal, then he shall buy it back at the valuation, and add a fifth to it; or, if it is not redeemed, it shall be sold at the valuation.
zh: 但如果是不潔淨的牲畜，他就要按照你的估價，加上五分之一把牠贖回；如果不贖回，就要按照你的估價賣掉。

en: "But no devoted thing that a man devotes to the LORD, of anything that he has, whether man or beast, or of his inherited field, shall be sold or redeemed; every devoted thing is most holy to the LORD.
zh: “一切永屬耶和華的聖物，就是人永獻給耶和華的物，無論是人或是牲畜，或是他承受作產業的田地，都不可以變賣，也不可以贖回；一切永獻之物都是歸耶和華為至聖的。

en: No one devoted, who is to be devoted for destruction from mankind, shall be ransomed; he shall surely be put to death.
zh: 如果有人永獻牲畜作永屬耶和華的聖物，就不可贖回；必須把牠殺死。

en: "Every tithe of the land, whether of the seed of the land or of the fruit of the trees, is the LORD's; it is holy to the LORD.
zh: “地上的一切，無論是地上的種子或是樹上的果子，十分之一是耶和華的，是歸給耶和華為聖的。

en: If a man wishes to redeem some of his tithe, he shall add a fifth to it.
zh: 如果人一定要贖回這十分之一，除物價以外，還要加上五分之一。

en: And every tithe of herds and flocks, every tenth animal of all that pass under the herdsman's staff, shall be holy to the LORD.
zh: 牛群和羊群的十分之一，就是一切從牧人杖下經過的，每第十隻都是歸耶和華為聖的。

en: One shall not differentiate between good or bad, neither shall he make a substitute for it; and if he does substitute for it, then both it and the substitute shall be holy; it shall not be redeemed."
zh: 人不可理會是好或是壞，也不可把牠更換；如果一定要更換，本來的與更換的，都要分別為聖，不能贖回。”

en: These are the commandments that the LORD commanded Moses for the people of Israel on Mount Sinai.
zh: 以上這些就是耶和華在西奈山，為以色列人吩咐摩西的律例。
